_note: Starter benchmark corpus, synthesized via macOS `say` (voices: Tingting zh-CN, Samantha en-US). TTS audio is cleaner than real speech, so absolute WER/CER reads optimistic — these are for RELATIVE comparison across engine configs. Replace/extend with real recordings later.

samples.text: 今天我们要去开会，讨论产品的下一个版本，记得带上笔记本电脑。
请把这个录音模块重构一下，把状态管理和模型加载逻辑解耦。
Please summarize the meeting notes and send them to the team by tomorrow morning.
我们用 WhisperKit 在 macOS 上做本地语音识别，然后跑 benchmark 测试性能。
